name: boltbytes-sync-desktop
description: Electron desktop sync client for BoltBytes with tray status, Windows drive mapping and EXE builds.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/api-client.js && node --check src/sync-engine.js && node --check src/renderer.js && node --check src/conflict-preload.js && node --check src/conflict.js

author: Henrik Smed
